turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_pm25_ligong not set
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先尝试精确匹配站点名称
query_ligong = text("""SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong' OR name = '理工' OR name LIKE '%理工%'""")
df_ligong = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
print("Ligong站点查询结果:")
print(df_ligong)

query_pumphouse = text("""SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House' OR name LIKE '%泵%' OR name LIKE '%North%'""")
df_pumphouse = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)
print("\nNorth Pump House站点查询结果:")
print(df_pumphouse)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试更多Ligong的可能名称变体
query_ligong_fuzzy = text("""SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%工%' OR name ILIKE '%ligong%' OR name ILIKE '%li gong%' LIMIT 20""")
df_ligong_fuzzy = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_fuzzy, engine)
print("Ligong站点模糊查询结果:")
print(df_ligong_fuzzy)

# 查看所有站点名称，帮助识别可能的Ligong站点
query_all_stations = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY name LIMIT 50""")
df_all = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print("\n部分站点名称列表:")
print(df_all)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有包含"理工"或"工"的站点名称
query_search = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE '%理工%' OR name ILIKE '%ligong%' OR name ILIKE '%li gong%' OR name ILIKE '%工%' LIMIT 100""")
df_search = pd.read_sql(query_search, engine)
print("包含'理工'或'工'的站点:")
print(df_search)

# 也尝试搜索"北泵房"附近的站点，确认北泵房ID
query_confirm = text("""SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE id = 238""")
df_confirm = pd.read_sql(query_confirm, engine)
print("\n北泵房站点确认:")
print(df_confirm)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取所有站点名称，查找可能的Ligong站点
query_all = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id""")
df_all = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 查找可能包含"理工"、"Li"、"工"等关键词的站点
df_filtered = df_all[df_all['name'].str.contains('理工|Li|工|Ligong|ligong', case=False, na=False)]
print("可能的Ligong相关站点:")
print(df_filtered)

# 如果还是没有，打印所有站点名称的前100个和后100个，人工检查
print("\n前100个站点:")
print(df_all.head(100))
print("\n后100个站点:")
print(df_all.tail(100))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 直接搜索所有站点名称中包含"理工"的
query_exact = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%理工%'""")
df_exact = pd.read_sql(query_exact, engine)
print("包含'理工'的站点:")
print(df_exact)

# 尝试搜索"Li"或"Li "开头的站点
query_li = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE 'Li%' OR name ILIKE 'Li %' OR name ILIKE '%Li%' LIMIT 50""")
df_li = pd.read_sql(query_li, engine)
print("\n包含'Li'的站点:")
print(df_li)

# 检查北泵房站点是否有2025-06-25的数据
query_check_data = text("""SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM hourly_station_air_quality WHERE station_id = 238 AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'""")
df_count = pd.read_sql(query_check_data, engine)
print("\n北泵房站点2025-06-25数据行数:")
print(df_count)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取所有站点名称，看看是否有类似"Ligong"的
query_all_names = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY name""")
df_all_names = pd.read_sql(query_all_names, engine)

# 打印所有名称，人工查找可能的Ligong
# 先打印名称长度较短的站点，可能是英文或拼音
df_short = df_all_names[df_all_names['name'].str.len() < 15]
print("名称较短的站点（可能是英文或拼音）:")

# 也尝试搜索"工"字结尾的站点
query_gong = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%工' OR name LIKE '%工%' LIMIT 50""")
df_gong = pd.read_sql(query_gong, engine)
print("\n包含'工'的站点:")
print(df_gong)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取北泵房站点2025-06-25的PM2.5和AQI数据
query_pumphouse_data = text("""SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi FROM hourly_station_air_quality WHERE station_id = 238 AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00' ORDER BY timestamp""")
df_pumphouse = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_data, engine)
print("北泵房站点2025-06-25数据:")
print(df_pumphouse)

# 计算北泵房的均值
mean_pm25_pumphouse_val = df_pumphouse['pm2_5'].mean()
mean_aqi_pumphouse_val = df_pumphouse['aqi'].mean()
print(f"\n北泵房均值 - PM2.5: {mean_pm25_pumphouse_val}, AQI: {mean_aqi_pumphouse_val}")

# 再次尝试查找Ligong - 可能是"理工"的拼音，或者是一个英文站点名
# 尝试搜索所有可能的名称
query_search_all = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE '%ligong%' OR name ILIKE '%li gong%' OR name ILIKE '%li_gong%' OR name ILIKE '%理工%' OR name ILIKE '%李工%' OR name ILIKE '%里工%'""")
df_search = pd.read_sql(query_search_all, engine)
print("\nLigong搜索结果:")
print(df_search)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取所有站点名称，看看是否有任何与"Ligong"相关的
# 尝试搜索所有包含"工"字的站点，因为"理工"可能是一个工业大学或工业区
query_gong_stations = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%工%' ORDER BY name""")
df_gong = pd.read_sql(query_gong_stations, engine)
print("所有包含'工'的站点:")
print(df_gong)

# 也尝试搜索所有站点名称中包含英文字母的

df_english = pd.read_sql(query_english, engine)
print("\n包含英文字母的站点:")
print(df_english)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试搜索所有可能的"Ligong"变体 - 包括拼音、中文音译等
query_variants = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE '%li%' AND name ILIKE '%gong%' ORDER BY name""")
df_variants = pd.read_sql(query_variants, engine)
print("包含'li'和'gong'的站点:")
print(df_variants)

# 尝试搜索"公"字，因为"Ligong"可能是"李公"或"里公"等
query_gong2 = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%公%' LIMIT 50""")
df_gong2 = pd.read_sql(query_gong2, engine)
print("\n包含'公'的站点:")
print(df_gong2)

# 获取北泵房站点的坐标，以便查询附近企业
query_station_coord = text("""SELECT id, name, ST_X(coordinate::geometry) as lon, ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) as lat FROM air_quality_station WHERE id = 238""")
df_coord = pd.read_sql(query_station_coord, engine)
print("\n北泵房站点坐标:")
print(df_coord)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取所有站点名称，按字母顺序排列，人工检查
query_all_sorted = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY name LIMIT 200""")
df_all_sorted = pd.read_sql(query_all_sorted, engine)

# 查找可能包含"L"、"Li"、"Lig"等开头的名称
df_l_start = df_all_sorted[df_all_sorted['name'].str.startswith('L', na=False)]
print("以L开头的站点:")
print(df_l_start)

# 也检查是否有"理工"的拼音"ligong"作为名称一部分
# 获取所有站点数量
query_count = text("""SELECT COUNT(*) FROM air_quality_station""")
df_count = pd.read_sql(query_count, engine)
print(f"\n总站点数: {df_count.iloc[0,0]}")

# 获取北泵房站点附近5公里内的企业
query_nearby_companies = text("""SELECT id, name, industry_type, ST_Distance(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(114.90403 40.87251)', 4326)) as distance_meters FROM polluting_company WHERE ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(114.90403 40.87251)', 4326), 5000) ORDER BY distance_meters LIMIT 20""")
df_companies = pd.read_sql(query_nearby_companies, engine)
print("\n北泵房站点附近5公里内的企业:")
print(df_companies)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 扩大搜索范围到10公里，查找北泵房站点附近的企业
query_companies_10km = text("""SELECT id, name, industry_type, ST_Distance(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(114.90403 40.87251)', 4326)) as distance_meters FROM polluting_company WHERE ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(114.90403 40.87251)', 4326), 10000) ORDER BY distance_meters LIMIT 30""")
df_companies_10km = pd.read_sql(query_companies_10km, engine)
print("北泵房站点附近10公里内的企业:")
print(df_companies_10km)

# 尝试搜索所有可能的"Ligong"变体 - 包括"理工"、"李工"、"里工"等
query_final_search = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name IN ('理工', '李工', '里工', '力工', '立工', '丽工', 'Li Gong', 'Ligong', 'LI GONG') OR name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%李工%' OR name LIKE '%里工%' OR name LIKE '%力工%'""")
df_final = pd.read_sql(query_final_search, engine)
print("\n最终Ligong搜索结果:")
print(df_final)

# 如果还是没有，尝试获取所有站点名称中包含"工"且名称较短的
query_short_gong = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%工%' AND LENGTH(name) <= 6 ORDER BY LENGTH(name) LIMIT 30""")
df_short_gong = pd.read_sql(query_short_gong, engine)
print("\n名称较短且包含'工'的站点:")
print(df_short_gong)

import pandas as pd

# Check what's in df_ligong and df_pumphouse
print("df_ligong columns:", df_ligong.columns.tolist() if df_ligong is not None else "None")
print("df_ligong shape:", df_ligong.shape if df_ligong is not None else "None")
print("\ndf_pumphouse columns:", df_pumphouse.columns.tolist() if df_pumphouse is not None else "None")
print("df_pumphouse shape:", df_pumphouse.shape if df_pumphouse is not None else "None")

# Also check if there are pre-computed values
print("\nmean_pm25_pumphouse_val:", mean_pm25_pumphouse_val if 'mean_pm25_pumphouse_val' in globals() else "Not found")
print("mean_aqi_pumphouse_val:", mean_aqi_pumphouse_val if 'mean_aqi_pumphouse_val' in globals() else "Not found")

# Query to find Ligong station and get its air quality data for 2025-06-25
query_ligong_aqi = text("""
SELECT hsaq.pm2_5, hsaq.aqi 
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON hsaq.station_id = aqs.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%理工%' 
AND DATE(hsaq.timestamp) = '2025-06-25'
""")
df_ligong_aqi = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_aqi, engine)
print("Ligong station air quality data for 2025-06-25:")
print(df_ligong_aqi.shape)
print(df_ligong_aqi.head())

# Calculate means if data exists
if len(df_ligong_aqi) > 0:
    mean_pm25_ligong_val = df_ligong_aqi['pm2_5'].mean()
    mean_aqi_ligong_val = df_ligong_aqi['aqi'].mean()
    print(f"\nMean PM2.5 Ligong: {mean_pm25_ligong_val}")
    print(f"Mean AQI Ligong: {mean_aqi_ligong_val}")
else:
    print("No data found for Ligong station on 2025-06-25")

# Search for stations with names containing "理工" or similar
query_search_ligong = text("""
SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%Ligong%' OR name LIKE '%ligong%'
""")
df_search_ligong = pd.read_sql(query_search_ligong, engine)
print("Stations with '理工' or 'Ligong' in name:")
print(df_search_ligong)

# Also check all station names to find the correct one
query_all_stations_names = text("""
SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY name
""")
df_all_names = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations_names, engine)
print("\nAll station names (first 50):")
print(df_all_names.head(50))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 精确搜索"理工"站点
query_ligong = text("""SELECT id, name, station_type, city_id, district_id, ST_AsText(coordinate) as coord FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = '理工' OR name LIKE '理工%' OR name LIKE '%理工' ORDER BY id""")
df_ligong = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

query_all_sorted = text("""SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY name""")
df_all_sorted = pd.read_sql(query_all_sorted, engine)

# 查找名称以"理"开头或包含"理工"发音的
